policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.recognition_basis_en: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.

records.snippet_en: converted to CO2equivalents. UNFCCC/Kyoto gases comprise: CO2e, CH₄ and N₂O, which are calculated based on amount of direct energy (i.e. the fuels stated un- der ‘Energy consumption’) that are consumed/combusted, and HFCs, PFCs, SF₆ and NF₃, which are based on direct consumption at entities/vessels controlled by Maersk.
